creator: c.kworr@gmail.com
text:
devel/subversion produces badly linked binary when built WITH_SERF after serf update to 1.0

The last fix for port only makes building succeed but doesn't changes anything.

Fix: 

none
How-To-Repeat: > svn up virtualbox
Updating 'virtualbox':
Assertion failed: (svn_fspath__is_canonical(parent_fspath)), function svn_fspath__is_child, file subversion/libsvn_subr/dirent_uri.c, line 2467.

> svn info virtualbox
Path: virtualbox
Working Copy Root Path: /home/arcade/svn/virtualbox
URL: https://svn.redports.org/virtualbox
Repository Root: https://svn.redports.org
